Monday.work: Plan the week: read the focus and required evidence, then reserve the study blocks.

Tuesday.work: Concepts and derivations: learn the week's core ideas and write a concise concept note.

Wednesday.work: Guided implementation: implement the central mechanism with references available.

Thursday.work: Independent implementation: reproduce or extend the mechanism without copying.

Friday.work: Recovery and review: close a small gap or rehearse the current concept aloud.

Saturday.work: Phase project and experiment: build, test, and run one controlled comparison.

Sunday.work: Finish the project increment, write results, rehearse an interview answer, and complete the weekly review.
